title: [Bug]: value changes after UNION ALL
poc: SELECT 1 FROM t WHERE COT(0.2)=0) UNION ALL (SELECT (BINARY c1 | 0) FROM t);
SELECT 1 FROM t WHERE 1 ) UNION ALL (SELECT (BINARY c1 | 0) FROM t);
SELECT 1 FROM t WHERE 0 ) UNION ALL (SELECT (BINARY c1 | 0) FROM t);
key_bug_features: UNION ALL with BINARY operator on float values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (c1 FLOAT, c2 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT 1 FROM t WHERE COT(0.2) = 0 UNION ALL SELECT (BINARY c1 | 0) FROM t;
SELECT (BINARY c1 | 0) FROM t WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
